# Thread: Jennifer's moving from Leptin Reset, CT, Adrenal RX, Leaky Gut RX  AI to Optimal
**Thread URL:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/>

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-20T18:00:53+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-3297>

Gonna start using this journal to keep me honest and to help me figure out what optimal eating is for me.

First Day of Spring =

Leptin Reset Day 18 (counting from the day after my indiscretion).

CT Day 14

SW 127.5

CW 130

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 ½

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 97.2

Breakfast at 5:30 am – 4 oz pork loin, some tuna fish w MCT, kale and spinach pan fried in CO, decaf tea with CO, and frozen CO mixed with cinnamon and stevia, Oh, and a hunk of coconut manna and the mineral water (mineral water was a mistake).

Result = hungry but full, super cranky and irritable and difficulty focusing.

CT this morning with ice packs on belly and back about 35 – 40 minutes. I noticed my neck is “out.” I wonder if it is from the yard work I did over the weekend. Because I also have Scoliosis, the amount of yardwork I did over the weekend would usually have me in a fair amount of pain. I figured the CT was helping. But, since I do spot CT on stomach and back and tub CT with my head and neck out of the water, I am wondering if that is why my back feels good but my neck is a mess. Gonna ice it when I get home. (Last night I did CT in tub for about 40 min at 55 degree water. The water was a little low and some of my belly was not submerged. I had the heater on in the bathroom and my arms and legs – which are not in the water – started to feel hot. Even though it is still very hard to get in, it wasn’t too bad once I did it. I wear a hat and gloves and cover my feet and arms. Since I had just purchased a thermometer, I took my temp afterward just for fun and was surprised to see it at 95! Seems really low. But I am warming up a lot faster.)

For my background, I started to work on my health about two years ago when I wanted to lose weight for my brother's wedding. A friend gave me P90X and I started doing that and watching what I ate. I successfully lost about 20 pounds but not from the places I really wanted to lose the most (as in my belly versus my chest-I went from a "D" to a "B"). No matter what I did, I still had belly fat and love handles.

At the end of 2010, after deciding to end a very stressful relationship, my health started to tank. I ended up in the gastro's office and was diagnosed with erosive gastritis and a gallstone, which bought me a double dose of Prilosec (and the advice to have my gallbladder out which I declined). I started gaining weight immediately at the rate of about a pound a week. And nothing I did would stop it. I worked out for an hour everyday. I had no social life. I started running and still gained. I got really strict with the diet and still gained. I was at my wits end. Then I heard about Hcg through my cousin and I found a homeopathic spray version. I started that in July 2011 and lost 17 pounds in 23 days and finally saw a difference in the love handles and belly flab, but I still had about 7 pounds to lose. Once in maintenance, I started to notice that my hair was falling out and I felt dizzy and hot. I started to think that my thyroid was overactive. I was on 112 mcg of levothyroxine for my Hashimoto's. So, I asked my doctor to check my TSH and sure enough, it was way low making me hyperthyroid. My doctor overreacted and took me off all meds, and then I was back to hypothyroid. God only knows the damage happening to my thyroid during this time. Now I am on 50 mcg. Just had bloodwork yesterday to check the level.

After this I started researching Hashimoto's and found out about the connection between gluten and Hashimoto's. Of course, my doctor told me that there was no connection, but I had all the proof in my own experience I needed. So, I continued to be "gluten-free" as in I wasn't eating wheat or drinking beer. I continued to have on and off problems with dizziness, muscle fatigue so bad that all I could do is lie down, and very bad moods which I would attribute to low blood sugar. I regained weight around Christmas with eating sweets and the added stress of buying a house (as a single woman) right after Christmas. Again, the weight just would not come off and I just could not get my eating under control. Every day I said I'd "behave" and everyday I would be bingeing on Greek Yogurt, Peanut Butter and Almonds. I ended up going a second round of HCG and relost the weight plus 2 more pounds. That landed me at 129. My goal weight is 125, mostly because at 129 I still have a pouchy belly.

While doing Hcg I started reading a lot of Paleo blogs and educating myself on what gluten-free really is and learning about the science behind "eating like a caveman." Then I found Jack Kruse and after reading up on Leptin Reset, I was "in." My weight at that time was staying around 127.5. I started the Leptin Reset on Sunday Feb 26th. I read about leaky gut and AI and adrenal fatigue. I then knew that my low blood sugar bouts were a symptom of adrenal fatigue not a lack of protein in my diet (I was low carb, how could I have not enough protein?!). I knew I would have to cut out the dairy, nuts and eggs but I had a hard time letting go. I basically kept eating what I had in the cupboard/fridge until it was gone and just didn't buy any more. I was keeping my weight the same BUT I had a housewarming party that Friday and had some vodka and grazed all night on foods. I, of course, immediately gained and was at 130. I got right back on the reset and have followed it since. The weight continues to go up and down, which does stress me out because I live in the +/- 2 pound HCG window. It's been an ongoing experiment to figure out what to eat for breakfast (without eating eggs) that makes me feel full and not super cranky. Someday, I feel physically full but my blood sugar/hormones feel hungry. Like today. For some reason, I poured myself a glass of sparkling mineral water for breakfast. I think that triggered a sugar response in me because I am super irritable and hungry but my stomach is full. I miss the Greek Yogurt and Cottage Cheese and my Olivio Coconut Butter (made with soy lecithin) and Marie's Blue Cheese Dressing (made with canola oil) and my peanut butter, almond butter, almonds, and the like. But I need to stop this snowball before it's a full blown avalanche. My mom's mother had Alzheimer’s and Osteoporosis. My mom has Osteoporosis and migraines. My dad's father has Parkinson’s Disease and his mom has Diabetes and is overweight. My dad has lymphocystic colitis, HTN, and high cholesterol. I already have Hashimoto’s and my adrenals are in the toilet along with my sex hormones (obviously). Need to stop the destruction now. And I am sick of feeling like crap and living my life with the constant worry of not having food when I have a low blood sugar attack. Plus, people get on my nerves and I am way snappish when my blood sugar is low. It negatively impacts my ability to work (I work with Mentally Ill Adults and it’s my job to help people, hard to do when everyone is on your last nerve). I hate feeling like a raw nerve that just wants everyone to go away.

So, up until the mis-step I had this morning, my blood sugar has been much more stable. My mood is still on the irritable side. My weight – I feel like my mid-section is inflated like a balloon. Constipation is ongoing problem. Super thirsty. All my food tastes bland. Waking up is getting easier. Staying up is getting harder. I was at a friend’s house last night and didn’t get home until 9pm. Still had to throw the pork loin in the slow cooker and do CT. So I wasn’t in bed until 10:30 pm. I am so tired today which isn’t helping my mood. I seem to have a good day followed by a bad day. Today, I am going to have to eat a lunch because my blood sugar feels off. I will be going to bed early tonight (after CT) and start again tomorrow!

Lunch at noon was ahi tuna steak, some tuna with MCT oil, celery, sauerkraut, and CO/cinnamon.

Dinner at 4:30 I was STARVING mini burger, more pork loin, spinach and seaweed cooked with CO. More pork loin. Coconut manna. My stomach is just gnawing at me. Not sure what is up but I had to stop eating. I also have a serious headache now and un-quenchable thirst. Drinking some salt water now. I took the estradiol 0.5mg. We'll see if it helps. CT next and then bed. EARLY

Leptin Reset Day 19

Morning temp 97.2

So super tired that I could not get up. Which is really weird because I went to bed so early (9pm) and I was a lot more strict with myself on the technology after sunset yesterday.

6 am breakfast - pork tenderloin, 2 bacon, canned salmon, broccoli, coconut oil, tea with MCT oil, salt water. Taste buds seem a little more alert today.

Since I got up late, I could only fit 15 min of CT in.

Feeling really light headed today and can’t figure why. Maybe pork is not good for breakfast. Might need to go back to steak. Also the thirst continues. So, my tummy feels full but my head is hungry (because it feels dizzy like low blood sugar). UGH I hate that.

lunch at 1pm - salmon, spinach with MCT oil and ACV, CO w cinnoman

Dinner at 5pm - felt dizzy so I figured I'd better eat - more pork, canned salmon and some green beans. Coconut manna

SO TIRED today

my muscles were feeling so fatigued earlier

a little better now

gonna cut out the roobios tea tomorrow and the astragalus and see if the low blood sugar is better

although, what I have been reading about the liver and how it works to feed the muscles, starting to make sense that I am LR at muscles and liver (and brain)

But I am also trying to take a more positive outlook. Stop focusing on how broken things are and focus on them being fixed.

I read CT 7 and now know I have to give up the electric blanket. I'm so cold after CT that I put it on to warm up. No more.

### differentstory — 2012-03-22T16:33:33+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-4411>

I love your journal!!! Just a thought, but when I stopped everything cold turkey (all of my bad foods), I first started doing a slow-carb diet and I was MISERABLE. I kept reading about Paleo those first couple of days, but I kept thinking, "If I am miserable now with some carbs, I can't imagine reducing them more!" But then with the Leptin Reset, I was STUFFING myself for breakfast everyday. To the point where I was miserable. And I had ZERO carb cravings! I still have ZERO carb cravings. It makes me wonder if you are not eating enough for breakfast?? What if, just as an experiment, you tried to eat even MORE for breakfast?

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-22T18:12:12+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-4479>

Thanks for reading and sharing. I am still fighting my brain on eating a BAB w/o overeating! Head games I think. But worth a shot! I just feel so physically full but brain says hungry. Glad to hear you are doing well - gives me hope! I just read some more of Dr K's responses on the blog and am getting clues as to what is going on with me. He told one person that if they have hypoglycemia issues it has to do with circadian rhythms. Which totally makes sense because this week I have been so tired I regularly go to bed at 9 pm and feel so tired all day. He also said that if you cut calories to lose weight, you'll gain during leptin reset at first. So, I think it's all sypmtOns of rewiring!

What things do you eat for breakfast? I'm not doing eggs but perhaps pork loin isn't a dense enough protein. Going back to steak!

### differentstory — 2012-03-22T20:23:42+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-4581>

LOL! I know what you mean. But I do find that when I eat so much that I will often skip lunch (or just eat a light lunch) so my guess is that if I was counting calories (and I purposely have been), it's the same amount no matter when you eat them.

I have been eating 6 large eggs for breakfast. I was having trouble getting them down, so I started scrambling them and adding butter and that made a world of difference. I was also drinking coffee with cream while eating them, but just read that I should probably not do cream. That's fine with me because 1 cup of coffee with 2 T. cream and the six eggs was killing me! And that was only 36g of protein. Then I moved to XL eggs and those are 7g each, so after getting rid of the coffee, I found it so much easier to do the 6 XL eggs (up to 42g of protein). Now if I can just add another egg I will be good!! Then I would be at 49g of protein which is fine with me. On any given day, I will enjoy the first 25% of the plate, think "This ain't so bad" when eating 50% of the plate, and think "Hm. . .starting to get very full after 75% of the plate. It's that last 25% that I have no desire to eat. It's tough! But I just go slow and take a bit every 2-3 minutes and I'm good.

Then for the next 6-7 hours if anyone even mentions food, I am like Y-U-C-K!!! Using this approach, I find the eating to be fullproof. There is just no way I am even tempted to cheat this way.

Yesterday was the first time I've had something besides eggs. Instead, I had pork belly. That probably sounds gross, but really it is just bacon without all of the strong flavor. I CANNOT eat bacon or sausage when doing this. It is just too over-powering for me. I want just bland.

I know what you mean about needing the re-wiring though. I \*feel\* like I could have lost more if I would have just eaten less. But I keep reminding myself that it was that mindset that got me to 203.8 in the first place.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-23T13:01:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-4896>

Leptin Reset Day 21

CT Day 16

SW 127.5

CW 130.

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 96.8

Went to bed around 10 pm last night...TIRED today

5:30 breakfast - stew meat I cooked in crock pot over night with a few baby carrots and a have a turnip fried in CO. NO Tea. Salt water.

CT 30 min with ice directly on skin. Tried icing my shoulders too and it was painful at first. Think I overdid - big red mark on my belly. No more direct skin with the ice packs.

I went back to the acupuncture guy to follow up on some allergy elimination I am working on. My primary goal is to be able to eat eggs again, but he did eggs, mold, tomatoes, gluten and dairy. I will not eat gluten again but the eggs, dairy and tomatoes would be nice. Well, the only thing that I seem closer to clear is mold. HA So, no eggs at farmer's market tomorrow  Since I was there, I had him test me on a few other things - curry powder, cinnamon, CO, butter (regular kind), green tea, red tea, coffee, cocoa powder, stevia and astralagus. Well, surprisingly I was weak with cinnamon and red tea. I was also weak with green tea and astralagus but I suspected those. Green tea makes me feel so bad - low blood sugar really bad. I was surprised about the cinnamon and red tea, which is a bummer because I love both. And I was pleasantly surprised that coffee and chocolate were ok. Although I can't have coffee until I get my adrenals back in working order! Oh well. I'll go back in a week and see if I cleared any of these allergies.

After that it was after noon and I was hungry. I had a small piece of haddock and some canned salmon with a salad and some sauerkraut and a little bit of KeVita. I was purposely going light on the CO today to see what would happened and I found out that I was HUNGRY. I had a bit of CO that I brought with me to the accu guy, so I ate that with cocoa powder and stevia.

I got home around 5pm and cooked a 1 pound steak. I didn't plan to eat it all, but I was so hungry that I did. And I ate more CO and some zucchini and some coconut milk. OMG I still feel hungry later. I pray this isn't from the estradiol pills. SO, I really ate a BAD-big ass dinner.

I have zero energy and after this note, hitting CT bath and bed. I hope my belly doesn't mind the cold with the pink mark. I guess I will find out.

Learning to obey the Leptin Reset - eat CO, BAB, 9pm bed time.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-24T15:23:02+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-5387>

Leptin Reset Day 22

CT Day 17

SW 127.5

CW 130.5 - UGH

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 97.6 7 am

UGH, another half pound

Well, after yesterday's feeding frenzy and CT over doing, I guess I should be glad it's only a half pound. I was asleep by 10 pm and woke up at 1:30 hot and having to pee (again). I did do a 30 min shallow cold tub last night since my belly has a big red mark on it. The belly is almost healed this morning. I was sort of awake at 5 am but since it is Saturday, I went back to sleep until 7am.

BAB - really thought I would up the protein after yesterday being so hungry. SO I had the other half pound of stew meat and a chicken sausage along with at least 2 tablespoons of CO (on pan fried turnips, in my tea and some mixed with cocoa powder). I forgot to take my estradiol last night so I took it morning. I pray this pill isn't what is totally messing with my appetite. Even after all that food, I felt I could eat more if I let myself. But now, over an hour later, I feel OK hungry wise. Mood wise, I feel miserable and want to go back to bed. Seriously cranky. hormones I am sure

I also got my TSH back and it's not as low as I'd like - only 2.82 (range .40-4.50). Probably why my temp is so low. Hoping CT will get my hormones in order so I only need the estradiol for a month. Just praying I can make it through three more weeks of Leptin Reset and estradiol without totally blowing up.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-25T00:21:08+0200
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-5587>

HI August!

The Leaky Gut Rx and Adrenal Rx are on the blog:

[http://jackkruse.com/the-leaky-gut-prescription/](http://http://jackkruse.com/the-leaky-gut-prescription/)

[http://jackkruse.com/what-might-casey-anthony-and-oj-have-in-common/](http://http://jackkruse.com/what-might-casey-anthony-and-oj-have-in-common/)

CW - is current weight and SW is starting weight

AI is for autoimmune....if you have any autoimmune issues, then there are some more foods that you should avoid. It's explained on Robb Wolf's blog

"Autoimmunity

Emerging research has made clear the link between Neolithic foods (grains, legumes and dairy) and autoimmune diseases such as Lupus, Rheumatoid Arthritis, Multiple Sclerosis and a host of other less well know conditions. Many people have found significant improvements in autoimmune disease by eliminating the Neolithic foods and building a diet around nutritious Paleo options. If you suffer from an autoimmune disease we highly recommend you start a Paleo diet and let us know what your results are. To give your body its best chance to heal we recommend that you initially limit the following foods:

Eggs

Tomatoes & eggplants

Peppers including bell peppers and hot peppers

Spices such as curries, paprika, and chili powder.

Some of these otherwise Paleo-friendly foods have been shown to be problematic in individuals with autoimmune issues. We recommend you fully remove not only these foods but also all Neolithic foods (grains, breads, potatoes, beans and dairy) for at least a month to see if they pose a problem for you."

hope that helps!

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-26T02:11:17+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-6118>

Leptin Reset Day 23

CT Day 18

SW 127.5

CW 130.0

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 96.8 7 am

So, I did my cold tubby earlier last night because I had plans out. I did the "croak soak" method in the interest of time and actually it worked out better for getting in but it's hard to control temp of water. I have been doing 55 degrees and it was probably closer to 50 but not sure if it stayed there as I filled up or not. I did 35 minutes and it was HARD to do. I definitely wanted out.

I got home after 10pm and went to bed. Noticed that I did NOT wake up in the middle of the night to pee and take off clothes, like I usually do after CT before bed. OF course, the temp is dropping around here as well. I am a little discouraged that I am so not cold adapted. Last night I saw a bunch of friends and each person I hugged felt warmed compared to me. OF course, I did CT right before I left, so... But I'm still pretty cold most of the time. Ever onward though.

I finally got up at 7 am, wanted to sleep a little longer but not happening. For breakfast, I had a soup bone cooking in crock pot over night. I don't what the heck kind of bone it was other than it was from a grass fed angus cow but it had a lot of meat on it so I ate the meat for breakfast. It was really fatty. I had no idea how much protein I ate, so I had one and half chicken sausages too. Along with shredded zucchini fried in CO. I didn't feel full after eating but I stopped. I am so glad I did because about three hours later, I was stuffedd! So weird. But I am glad that the starving feeling has gone away. My appetite didn't come on until 4pm so I think the BAB was maybe a little to BA. I wanted to eat before 5pm because my bedtime is 9pm. SO, I glad it finally kicked in a little.

I did spot CT after breakfast and was SO COLD. brrr

then I went to a 10 am yoga class. I usually go to yoga at least once a week and usually Wed nights at 6pm but I've been too tired to go the last two weeks. I made it through yoga fine but kind of felt like crap afterward - dizzy and muscles feel like lead. I guess I am still LR at liver and muscles. I guess I can stop feeling guilty about skipping exercise. It's not working for me yet.

I purchased a liver at the farmer's market and had it soaking and defrosting in milk kefir. I have NEVER eaten liver before, let alone cooked it but it wasn't hard to do. Someone said use lots of cumin, so I did and it wasn't bad. Weird consistency. Only problem is I have way too much liver for just me to eat. So I used one piece for dinner and one piece went in the ninja and I added it to ground turkey to make meat balls. I figure those will keep and I can freeze some too. I guess I will need to eat the other two pieces for breakfast tomorrow, so back into milk kefir and in the fridge they went. OMG I am so full again. I had the liver and some bacon. I also found 99% unsweetened chocolate - Scharffen Berger is the brand. It comes in a really thick bar, so it was a pain to break off a piece but I did. It wasn't bad, but I'm sure it would be better made into Optimal Bark. But eating it did not kick in that "omg, I need to eat more" response, so that is GOOD! I want to make the bark but again, since I have trouble stopping once I start, I am waiting. Spring is just only sprung.

Well, I gotta hit my cold tubby...

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-26T22:16:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-6553>

Leptin Reset Day 24

CT Day 19

SW 127.5

CW 129!

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 97.0 5am

I was so full yesterday I was sure I would see a gain this morning and I was dreading it because of the whole +/- 2 pound hcg window that I live in. And to my surprise & delight, I was down a pound! Thank goodness.

CT last night - croak soak, temp close to 50 and I did about 35 minutes. It was all I could take. It's gotten colder here in Buffalo and it was so hard to warm up. I was freezing my booty off in bed. I saw someone post a picture of their CT tub and they must be using a pool thermometer. That would be a good idea. I use a meat thermometer and it works but I have to hold it and it hard to do croak soak and hold a thermometer.

5:30 am breakfast – I cooked up the liver but skipped bacon. Big mistake. I didn’t like it as much without bacon and had a hard time getting it down. In the end, I ate about 2/3 of it. I had some sauerkraut with it as well and cooked up half a chicken sausage to boost up the protein. I was so full yesterday, I didn’t know what to think.

Well, that must not have been a big enough BAB because although I was NOT starving, I was feeling low blood sugar effects – cranky and light headed, so hard to focus on anything. My stomach was also killing me and I can tell that I am dehydrated too because my head hurts and my contacts are dry. Too much Mag yesterday? It’s a hard balancing act that I have been living with since completing my first round of Hcg. I hate the low blood sugar feeling and have been struggling with it off and on since August. Every time I think I know what is causing my low blood sugar, something else comes up – I thought it was electrolyte imbalance, then high TSH, then adrenal fatigue and now even low estrogen.

12:30 pm – needed my lunch so that I could function at work without killing any one. I had some left over cabbage and spinach with the turkey/liver meatballs and some mustard. They were actually pretty good. I made them with cumin, curry and chili powder. The chili powder was a good call. I also had some CO and a small amount of bone broth that I had left over. I definitely need to pound the protein as I still feel like crap. I can’t wait to go home and get my contacts out of my eyes and pound some protein!

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-27T23:12:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-7363>

Leptin Reset Day 25

CT Day 20

SW 127.5

CW 130.5!- UGH (it’s back plus a half pound)

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 97.3 5am

Kind of a rough night. My own “fault” really. I forgot about on online project and got sucked into it until 9pm. (My glasses finally came-good thing) I didn’t get upstairs until after 9 and my fingers and toes were already white from the cold in the house because the heat is set at 55 degrees. I tried to warm up so I could get in the tub. Finally got in for about 35 minutes and it was tough! At 10pm when I went in my room, it was frigid! I got the space heater out and the room temp was only 52. I left it one for a while and then turned it off and fell asleep. I woke up about 1:30 am (like clockwork after late CT) to pee and I was freezing. Turned the heater back on and fell asleep. I woke up and turned it off and it said 66 degrees. About two minutes later my alarm went off. Interestingly enough, my body temp read the highest ever at 97.3.

6am BAB was a grass fed angus burger, chicken sausage and some zucchini fried in CO and ghee. Along with Tulsi tea with MCT oil and ghee. Fatsecret said I was under my protein, so I pan fried some canned salmon with curry powder and a splash of coconut milk. I also had some frozen CO. Thought that would be enough but by the time I got to work, I was feeling really irritable. Everyone is riding my nerves. So, not good. Also I am so bloated! (Coconut milk?) UGH Oh and yesterday I was down 1 pound, today I’m up 1 pound and a HALF! UGH so Frustrating! I hate being so close to +2. I just don’t know what I’ll do – steak day? Or stick with leptin reset? I do not want to be set back in this leptin reset. Please God, I do not want to do this forever. I did spot CT for 30 minutes before work.

Since I was a cranky mess, I decided to eat my lunch. I had that I’m starving/I feel full oxymoron going on. I thought I’d eat half of it but I ate the whole thing – salmon, asparagus and avocado puree (avocado, basil, MCT oil, spices, mustard). It tasted bland which made me pause because yesterday it tasted great to me. Maybe my zinc is out of whack again?

After lunch my mood is much improved. Having the same starving/full dilemma for dinner. But I will need to eat something before CT. Planning on doing that right after dinner and having the whole night to warm up. But ugh, I feel so fat today…

Dinner...down a pouch of tuna in olive oil with some bone broth and 5 slices of bacon. I didn't feel that hungry but once I started eating, it was like I was starving. Still wouldn't say I am full but I'm calling it quits. Gotta get in the tub...dragging my butt. Something inside me wills me to do it and that part of me has no reservations. CT will be done. But this other part of me is such a baby! LOL

### differentstory — 2012-03-27T23:40:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-7378>

> **Jennifer;7401 wrote:** I had that I’m starving/I feel full oxymoron going on.

I love this line!!! I was trying to tell DH about how I was feeling the other night and I couldn't explain it. Next time I'm going to use your words.

Sorry you are having a tough day.  I was having a whole week of those last week. This week I am SOOO much better. I think it's because of 3 things: I started taking Vitamin D (only taking 2,000ui right now even though I know others are taking 5000-10000). I started taking Iodine this weekend and it has really helped my thyroid so much (already!!!). I can't believe it. Have you read the iodine thread on MDA? It's a lot to take in, but I'm glad I did. My skin is softer, my hair is not falling out nearly as much (I comb my hair over the sink after I get out of the shower and it was only 1/3 as much as usual), and my temp is back to normal!!! (It was anywhere from 97.0-98.1 each day). Also, I was having a hard time getting the scale to move. It was totally stuck. So then two days ago, after a ton of reading, I started adding A LOT of fat to my diet. Last night for dinner I had a whole package of bacon (is that a half pound?? pound??). I was actually craving it. And I started doing bulletproof coffee. Sure enough, the past two days (the only two days I did the higher amounts of fat), I am down 1.7 pounds. Just thought I would throw that out there too since it worked for me.

Hang in there. Tomorrow is a new day!

### differentstory — 2012-03-28T01:25:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-7416>

Maybe you could try tea? But I guess that has caffeine too? Have you done the saliva tests?

I was just researching them.

I actually didn't order the bulletproof coffee from the link. I just went to wholefoods and bought two different coffees there. I read that people said you could find good coffee in lots of places and so I googled "wholefoods coffee" and picked two that were recommended (allegro and metropolis). Both are insanely good and I don't notice the jitters at all. I haven't noticed the increased energy, but this is all VERY early for me, so I'm sure my body is going through a crazy ride right now.

The reason I started the coffee though was so that I could get the CO and butter down (my throat). I HATE CO! I cannot stand the smell of it cooked - it is too pungent. And I have an equally hard time eating it plain. In the coffee, though, it is MUCH easier - it's actually pretty good! So I have been driinking two cups in the morning - each with 1 T. of CO and 1 T. of Kerry Gold. I was using Ghee for all cooking, but the KG is waaaaaaaaaaaaayyy better in the coffee. I know I shouldn't probably be doing the KG, but I'm just going to see how it goes with the scale. Today was the first day with the KG.

I also find that I am ridiculously full with 2 BP coffees. Between that and my BAB, I can't eat for 7-8 hours at least. I am completely full up until that point. Love it too because I honestly hate thinking about food. It is such an ordeal.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-28T14:59:04+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-7671>

I do but CO and ghee in my caffiene free tea each morning and whip it up in the blender. Its ok but not as good as coffee! You know there are a lot of different coconut oils and some have much less smell and taste. I enjoy mine though, which is a good and bad thing. I was mixing some CO with unsweetened cocoa powder, stevia and some mix-ins (like cacao nibs or chia seeds) and then I stick it in the freezer and eat it like candy. I liked it. But I had to give up the chocolate too for adrenal Rx  My poor adrenals....hope they get better ASAP so I can have coffee and chocolate again!

Glad to hear you can do two meals a day. I usually can do it on the weekend but find it hard to do at work. I feel much better today, so we'll see...

Have a great day!

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-28T15:57:35+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-7692>

Leptin Reset Day 26

CT Day 21

SW 127.5

CW 129.5

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 97.2 5:30 am

CT last night was earlier around 6:30 pm. But I was still freezing. I don’t feel warmer after eating at all. It was a major internal struggle to stay in for 40 min and the water was probably closer to 60 than 55. Near the end I started to shiver. Afterward I was shaking from being so cold and kept thinking that this was a new kind of ab workout. I went to bed with the room heater on for one hour. In the middle of the night (2:30) I woke up feeling too hot and threw off some covers.

Had a difficult time getting up this morning which is kind of surprising because I went to bed at 9 and was asleep by 10pm.

Down a pound this morning. YAY I graded my food intake as “a lot” yesterday and yet down a pound. Gotta change the thinking. I have some thoughts about my low blood sugar problems from the last two days. One being that I did eat the 99% chocolate and chocolate is clearly listed as an adrenal trigger, so…The other is the liver detox tea. I am just now noticing that I was feeling pretty good this morning until I drank the liver detox tea. Now I feel like my head weighs a ton and my stomach is kind of acidy. I think I need to save this tea for only after dinner. I don’t remember it bothering me when I had it after dinner.

6 am BAB – I had put some stew in the crock pot last night so it was all ready for me. Still a little bland, but pretty good – stew meat, radishes, baby carrots and some celery. I also cooked up some bacon and ate my CO. Lunch will be haddock and asparagus cooked in the bacon grease and some ghee butter. IF I need it. I only had about 25 min for spot CT this morning.

I totally needed my lunch and I was still hungry so I ate some bacon from the kitchen here at work. Probably not the best since I am sure its loaded with crap.

For dinner I felt like trying the crab I've had for a while and I cooked it up with shredded zucchini and CO and lemon. It was only so so. I still felt hungry, so I had the left over stew and some bacon and CO. Then I felt too full. I need to learn to eat heavier protien. I am trying to eat more seafood like Dr K says but I find I need a dense protein to stop the blood sugar madness.

I helped a friend move for a little while and took quite a few trips up and down the stairs then home for CT. I did croak soak and really started out in warmish water. I think it worked a lot better. I think the water was pretty close to 50 degrees and I managed 45 minutes. I wasn't as cold when I got out either. Today was a warmer day here in Buffalo. It was about 55 degrees when I got home. Afterward, it was really only my legs that felt really cold. When I got in bed, I noticed that I felt colder.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-03-29T18:32:47+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-8324>

Leptin Reset Day 27

CT Day 22

SW 127.5

CW 130.0

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 97.5 5:30 am

Wow. Morning temp is 97.5! Go me. But a quick look in the mirror results in ugh – huge bags under my eyes and yet I got in bed at 9pm and was asleep by 10, I am sure. Oh well…whatever, just go with it. LOL

6am BAB – 200g of top round beef and 5 pieces of turkey bacon and asparagus and CO and ghee. (I need to get to the artisan market to pick up better bacon) I had a taste of the chicken curry with cabbage I made over night. Not bad but definetly needs something. It called for red peppers but I’m not eating them on the AI protocol. I would have liked to put in some hot spices, but my tummy hasn’t been that happy with them lately, so I held off. The recipe was easy – coconut milk, curry paste, chicken, cabbage, slow cooker. But my stomach is so bloated now! Was it the small amount of coconut milk? IDK what a PIA

I am hoping to be able to skip lunch today because I am pressed for time tonight. I have an appointment at the sauna at 4:30 and want to do CT afterward. And I need to be at a friend’s house by 6pm. Kind of tight. Might have to just blast the AC in the car and do CT tonight. But I also need to go to the grocery store and clean my house. Not sure how I will fit that in before 9pm! LOL I am going away on Saturday and need to be ready. My parents are coming Saturday to pick me up. I could always clean Saturday morning. I am nervous about the trip and sticking with Leptin Reset. We are going to visit my grandparents because my grandfather is not doing well. He has Parkinson’s Disease and recently took a turn for the worse. They had to take him off one medication because it was giving him hallucinations but now his muscle rigidity is much worse. Any way, my grandmother is VERY OPINIONATED and I do not want to get into it with her. So, I am worried my eating schedule coinciding with others. I hope to be able to just do two meals and cut back on some stress there. I also know that CT bath will not be an option. I might go back to face dunks. I kind of skipped that because my sinuses could not tolerate it. I felt like I was choking every time I tried to do it and got a bad sinus upset afterward. The up side is, I am going to Maine and will be by the ocean! Lots of seafood available and I guess if I was brave I could go jump in the ocean! LOL People would think I am nuts! I might bring a suit just in case.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-04-10T15:48:25+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-13319>

Leptin Reset Day 39

CT Day 34

SW 127.5

CW 132.5!

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 &1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Morning temp 97.3 5:30 am

So, it’s been a while since I checked in. I went on a little family trip to visit my grandparents. I surprisingly kept my weight around 130. It was really hard because my family eat a lot of sugar and snack constantly. And my head wants to do what they do. It was killing me to see them eat chocolate and cinnamon toast (one of my most favorite things)! I did eat some things that aren’t so Leptin Reset friendly – I had some nuts and I bought a coconut cream Larabar and ate it over two days. The upside was I was in Maine and got to eat Lobster and scallops! We also had prime rib one night. So good! We went out to eat for lunch and I had fish taco salad (minus the chips) with mango cole slaw. I asked if there was any added sugar in the mango slaw and was told “no” but it tasted really sweet and I felt weird after. I was sure I would gain but I didn’t. I also was not able to do the cold tubs on vacation. I kept up with spot CT after breakfast and did do face dunks at night. I noticed that my morning temps were going up as well. I did stick with going to bed by 10 pm most nights, although it was an 8 hour drive there and back, so those days I was in the car late. I was shocked to come home and only be up a half a pound for the week but really happy. Unfortunately, I started gaining when I was home! First a pound, then another! Then down a pound, up a half and Up another whole pound. That lands me at a total gain of 5 pounds for my Leptin Rest. I could cry.

Since I did my last round of Hcg, my LSW (Last Spray Weight – I did homeopathic Hcg Spray) was 129. I got down to 127 and was super happy there. But I’ve slowly creeped up and nothing I do on this Leptin Reset seems to take the weight off! I tried to do a mini-protocol day instead of a steak day when I hit +2.5. That was yesterday and today I’m up another pound! UGH So frustrating. I ate two eggs for breakfast and took real coffee with ghee butter and CO to work. I felt dizzy and hungry like I do when I have low blood sugar but I made it to lunch. I ate salmon (from a pouch) with MCT oil and some celery. I also had some sauerkraut. Then I went for a massage and got home at 6pm starving. I had a large portion of steak and some spinach with MCT oil. I had a party to go to, so I made some gauc and I did taste it (to make sure it was edible) but I didn’t eat anything at the party. I was up later than usual last night because I was having fun with my friends – something I haven’t been doing because of my early bedtime and early dinnertime. Plus I heard that my sister-in-law’s C-section got moved up to Wed, so I was texting with family members until 11pm. And I didn’t wear my glasses to the party, so I was in un-natural light for awhile! BUT – that leaves me totally confused as to how to keep my Hcg protocol and weight loss and do this Leptin Reset. Going back to the Hcg way didn’t work. I know Dr K has said not to worry about weight gain unless you are doing biological mismatches, but maybe I am! I ate really strict yesterday and still gained! I feel really confused and stuck – can’t go back to the old way, but this new way has got me up 5 pounds! Ugh, I am NOT doing another round of Hcg and still have fat to lose (7 pounds). I just can’t seem to get this belly fat off of me!!!

Today I did the BAB, I figured it wasn’t worth potentially messing up the Leptin Reset to be hungry all day and gain a pound! SO, I had leftover steak with some radishes, two eggs with some kale, and two pieces of pork belly that I baked in the oven with salt, pepper, and cinnamon (thanks Clabbergirl-it was delish!).

I’m also so confused about CT and whether it’s working for me or not. I noticed my morning temps were higher last week without the cold tubs. And since coming home, I did two days of CT tubs and gained a pound both days. And I have been dreading the tubs. The last tub I did was Sunday and I did it in the afternoon. I was exhausted and freezing afterward. I hated it the whole time. I skipped the tub yesterday and had a short CT session too (I got up late) and gained a pound. So, I don’t know what is setting me off and what is working for me. With tub CT my morning temp is 97. When I skip, it’s higher. So confusing. Do I want my morning temp to be low? I’ve been on the Estradial for three weeks and still no sign of TOM. Of course, my mood is miserable (interestingly enough I felt really great last night), so who knows what is going on inside my body…I could cry today.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-04-24T18:13:08+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-18381>

Good gravy, I have no idea where I'm at other than to say, probably back at the beginning. I've been on quite a bender. The triggers started at the beginning of April when I went to Maine to visit my grandparents with my parents. My grandpa has Parkinson's Disease and has gotten to the point of hospice care and frequent hallucinations. Being with my family is always a trigger to eat. They are all sugar junkies, especially my grandmother. My grandmother is a control freak (I love her dearly but she has always been wound too tight and with my grandpa sick and she, at 84 and not great health, is his primary care giver, well she's about 100x worse). She has diabetes and is overweight. Sugar is her drug of choice and you will never convince her to give it up. She also is always right about everything and my dietary choices did not go unnoticed by her. Also my weight, as in "too thin." which of course at 5'6&1/2 and 132 pounds I was not too thin. My grandmothers behavior definitely was not good for my poor adrenal glands. She is very dramatic (yes, it might be a trait I share with her!) and very short fused. Again, I'm sure her adrenals are shot given everything with my gramps.

But anyway, I made it through that without gaining and then came home and blew it with coconut manna and just too much food and gained three pounds. Since I am a post HCG-er, this is a big "no no." I tried to do correction days and suffered bad low blood sugar because of it, which of course means that with Hashimotos, any time you have low blood sugar, your thyroid is taking a beating. I managed to lose a day but then returning to "normal" eating (as in, eating varied proteins and veggies instead of a "chicken day", "egg day" "steak day") would be an immediate return to weight gain. Then I had another trigger from my BFF announcing she is pregnant with her 5th baby (long story) and of course, we are the same age, only I'm single, childless, and haven't had a period since turning 40. This news triggers a lot of bad feelings for me which I try to ignore for several reasons - one, just because I can't figure out my love life and get the family I want doesn't mean other people should stay stuck along with me just so I'm not "alone." And, well, it ain't about me. So, I tried to focus on the positive but the energy was there inside me. I had a work conference out of town, so I could have gone crazy at the buffets on total cheats, but I didn't let myself. I don't let myself eat gluten but I can get into real trouble with paleo foods and paleo-ish foods (like NUTS). I came home and totally went off. In the span of two days I had two Larabars, a lot of almond butter, three sugar free chocolate bars, pecans, dried cherries. This added three more pounds on. Now, I'm at my parents visiting my family because we have a new addition - my brother and his wife had a baby girl two weeks ago. Being with my family is such a trigger. My mom has these nuts she buys at Sam's club - salted mixed nuts and I have eaten them until last night when I finally felt sick over them. My mom and brothers have always been thin. Just me and my dad with the belly-fat, no arse syndrome. But my mom's poor eating has "caught up with her." She has osteoporosis and I am certain a leaky gut. She started getting migranes two years ago and takes medicine at the drop of a hat (for headache, sinus, heartburn...she has a very low tolerance for pain). I feel her system is probably so toxic with the results of taking so many OTCs and dietary choices. I have begged her to at least stop the diet pops and splenda. She stopped buying it but when we were the mall she told me that even though I wouldn't like it, to get her a diet dr pepper. What can I do other than present the choices? She also has this eye condition - pterygium, which worries me as I have read up on it and the surgery sounds horrible and like it really doesn't work. She tried face dunks once but gave up on it. So, she listens but doesn't have great follow through. I also worry because her mom had Alzheimer's and Osteporosis and early menapause. A little too familar for me and my mom. My mom would follow through on the diet if my dad did. My dad is much more the driver, so to speak. They did go paleo for about 6 months but my dad also has a weird GI problem. It's changed names over the years but I think lymphocyctic colitis is the latest. Basically, really weird foods trigger him to have diarhhea, like lettuce. So, he went paleo but still was getting sick. They both lost weight but fell off the wagon and are back on gluten and sugar. So, even though I worry about them, my head wants to eat like they do. Whenever I am with them, I get these thoughts about "it's not fair" and other BS. I get weird urges to eat things fast and in big quantities, almost like secret eating behavoirs. UGh, so disappointing to not be in control.

So...I'm at 136+. On the one hand, I could kill myself (figuratively) on the other hand, I don't give a s&\*%. I'm very self destructive at times. Of course, gaining weight makes me want to give up on dating, which compounds my stupid head games over my love life and babies. Vicious cycle. And then there is the feeling like crap inside - the no energy, legs of cement and short temper.

I think I did this partly to see if there would be a point that I would stop gaining. That's what I have hated about hcg. Ever since I lost weight with hcg I've had a terrible time with low blood sugar and gain at the slightest deviation. I can't even have a glass of wine. Which is killing me. I just want to be able to eat butternut squash (in season) without gaining. Well, the two pound window has been blown. I have gained at least a half a pound every day. (damn nuts) So, now I guess I can focus on something else. I have been wanting to add more things in the leaky gut RX but wouldn't because they made me gain. Guess I don't have to worry about that any more.

But bottom line is, my hormones are a mess. My current docs are not helping me out. I have an appointment with the endo on May 6th and the functional med doc on May 17th. We'll see which one is really going to sort me out here.

I follow more of an Eastern philosophy and there is a teacher who sums up his work in one word - "STOP" and that is what I keep telling myself - just STOP (the mind f-ing behavior). Just stop

### nicebeanst@yahoo.com — 2012-04-24T19:39:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-18406>

Jennifer, hang in there. I'm at work now, can't be long here, but wanted to let you know you are not alone. I had a bender last weekend of sorts and I am up 5# from where I started and 7 total ( I was 152, went to 150, now I'm 157) We'll figure it out, and we are in the right place (literally, if not mentally LOL) to figure our stuff out.

Take care

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-04-24T20:27:15+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-18416>

Thanks Teenie Leek!

It cheers me to get your note of support. I know my life is really good and I am lucky. But stuffing feelings doesn't work. It's so food to be honest and feel supported! Sending you support right back!

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-04-26T23:52:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-19147>

April 26, 2012

Leptin Reset Day 1 (I am guessing that due to my extreme ingestion of nuts, I am back at the beginning).

CT – Also been totally slacking here

SW 127.5

CW 134.5

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6.5

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut

Morning temp got up late so I skipped today

So, as I have fessed up to, I was on a bit of a bender while at my parent’s house. (NUTS) It started last Thursday (before I left for my parents) when I broke open the Trader Joe’s almond butter with roasted flax seeds and then got into these left over Chocoperfection bars (sugar free, sweetened with oligofructose and erythritol). Oh yes, and the Larabar I had in the cupboard.

I stopped at Trader Joe’s in Cleveland (we don’t have a TJs here) and bought pistachios, pecans, unsweetened dried cherries, and a sugar free chocolate bar. Got to my parents and got into my mother’s giant Sam’s club tub of roasted mixed nuts (almonds, cashews, pecans, hazelnuts, brazil nuts, sea salt and COTTONSEED OIL!) I also had some of the 85% chocolate bar I bought for my dad (low in sugar but it had some). I also ate cheese and eggs and butter (as in, not ghee butter). OH, and coffee (what can I say, when I go off, I really go off) Prior to this, I was avoiding all sweets, even Stevia. And was severely limiting Coconut Manna and other coconut products (like milk, Kevita, etc) but going pretty heavy on the CO. In fact, I almost wonder if I eat TOO MUCH CO. I go through a small jar in like 4 days. That’s a lot, right.

I am disappointed that I was on week 7 of the reset and snapped. I just wonder will I ever make it 8 weeks with no slips. I really miss wine. And it makes dating kind of hard. Coffee dates or rather tea dates are good for initial meet ups but usually its dinner and drinks. So, there’s that. And wine actually might help me chill the f out, which is my current self appointed RX. I will say that I notice that my skin is super dry, even flaking off of me right now. It’s gross. I’m guessing that is not a sign of leptin sensitivity, right?

Well, yesterday I had the last of the pistachios and like 5 dried cherries. But thank god I am finally away from those darn nuts. Especially since I cannot afford the extra O6 at all. Today, I’m back at home and back on track, except I majorly need to hit the grocery store for food. I stopped at Trader Joe’s and Whole Foods in Cleveland on my way home, so I had some bacon and salmon in a can but not much else. I ended up eating that and some eggs (with kale) to up my protein. Trying to limit my egg consumption because of my AI issues. I did go for allergy elimination with acupuncture, but I think I still should go easy. I also had decaf tea with CO and pasteurized butter. And some of my homemade sauerkraut (I love it). Lunch was salmon with coconut aminos, butter, and mustard along with chicken bone broth and bacon (from our work cafeteria, so it was probably not high quality). I had CO with stevia and chocolate after both meals. I put ground flaxseed in one of them and it tasted pretty good. I know Dr K is not a fan of flaxseed meal but I read it is a replacement for estrogen, so I threw it in.

I feel dehydrated today (contacts are very dry). I had pretty bad irritation (= low blood sugar) this morning but my mood is improving with the day.

I stayed up late last night reading blogs (with my blue blocker glasses on). Since I was off for almost a week, I was sleeping in until 7:30/8 at my parents. Since I started the Leptin Reset I really have gotten out of the habit of using an alarm clock because I hadn’t needed one. Well, today I woke up at 6:15 and was like “oh sneakers.” I really need to get up at 5:30. So, I had to move it but it all got done.

Not sure what I’ll have for dinner. I’m leaving work in a minute and feel pretty hungry. So, I’m thinking since I had salmon for breakfast and lunch, I’ll probably do beef of some sort. Have to hit the market on my way home. Hoping to get to the Farmer’s Market soon because I really want to get some liver.

I was reading Dr Lam's adrenal blog. It outlines the different stages of adrenal fatigue. I was wondering why adapatogens listed for adrenals were giving me low blood sugar crashes. Well, I guess if your adrenals are past a certain point, you really should not take things to stimulate them because they are just too maxed out already. I am tossing around the idea of rehmannia glutinousa for adrenals. Gotta look into it some more. I need to be put into hibernation for 8 weeks so I have NO STRESS and no cheats...LOL...just wondering who would pay all my bills? LOL

Tootles for now...

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-05-05T04:45:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-21503>

5/4/12

Confession is good for the soul or so they say. I am still in sabotage mode. I have stopped weighing myself, so I have no idea for sure, but I've probably gained about 12 pounds by now. I put on some pants today that I had put away because they were "way too big" and the fit to the point of a little snug

I just can't seem to get control of my eating. I still eat the BAB and only three meals but totally overdoing with the coconut manna and coco-crack and other things. I've pretty much been eating protein and CO with chocolate. I finished the jar of coconut manna and will not be buying another. I also have been making things with flaxmeal. SIGH

This is the way I have been - hot or cold, on or off, good or bad.

I am disappointed in myself but also there is a part of me that just couldn't do it any more. Maintaining my hcg weight loss was such a struggle. It was a constant source of stress and it was like holding a beach ball underwater - the more pressure I applied, the more tired I felt and the more I knew that sucker was just gonna blow sooner or later.

Not sure how the heck I'll get the weight off now. I know becoming Leptin Sensitive is my ticket to better health and weight loss, but I feel like the only way I'll get there is to check into a center that controls my eating for 8 weeks.

I just keep praying that sooner or later I am going to get tired of this yo-yo crap I do and just drop the whole darn sabatoge routine.

The weird thing is, minus how gross I feel with this bulging belly, I feel otherwise so much better! I am happy again. I don't know if those estrogen pills finally kicked in or if the reset is somehow still working even though I am eating these carbs or if my adrenals are just coming back to life or what. When I was eating the strict keto, I was still struggling with weight (but significantly less) but I felt like S&\*$%. The low blood sugar attacks were so bad. Sometimes I seriously felt like I could kill people and other times it was all I could do to stand up and walk. My energy sucked too.

Now, I feel emotionally lighter but fat.

I keep saying that I am gonna pull it back together but I haven't yet.

Pray for me. That's about all I can say.

Tomorrow is Cinco de Mayo.

Since I tried to start the reset in March, I have had wine only once. No other alcohol. I will probably have a drink tomorrow. Well, we'll see. If I give myself permission, then I don't want it.

But, Monday I gotta get back on the keto and CT wagon STAT!

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-05-05T05:33:26+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-21520>

Friday night

Forgot to mention I got my emWave2 in the mail yesterday. I had been thinking about getting one after listening to a podcast with Dave Asprey and he recommended this Heart Math stuff. And then, after I mentioned being triggered by some news, Dr K suggested biofeedback training. He said my thoughts were driving my adrenals to drink. Well, eat is more like it. Even though I love my wine, the food is more my go to drug of choice. I've only played around with it a little. Basically, you wear a little ear clip and it measure what it calls coherence. If you are out of coherence it's red, moving closer it's blue and coherence is green. So far I am not sure I get the connection between coherence and my state of mind, but I do the exercises. I want to see what happens if I try to use it during an acute moment - as in when my mind starts with the bs stories that really work me over.

here's a blog about the thing, if anyone is interested

[http://www.bulletproofexec.com/emwave2-hrv-data-export/](http://http://www.bulletproofexec.com/emwave2-hrv-data-export/)

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-05-05T16:17:43+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-21600>

Saturday-just my random thoughts here

Life is such a crazy paradox most of the time. It's like the one thing you "try" so hard to get, you push away. Like everything is just backwards.

I am trying to find a way to change my thinking so I stop this internal war with myself. I think the reason I have not yet be successful is that I always set up in my head that I must control myself and force myself to do these diet routines. Then I set up this "good" "bad" war which I just can't stand. I'm not a dog, there is no good behavior and bad behavior. There are behaviors that move me closer to my ideal and behaviors that move me away from it.

Even though it may seem that I am very lackadaisical right now, I think I am actually much too hard on myself. I need to realize that I am going through a lot more on the emotional level. I keep focusing on the food I am putting in my mouth and not on how I'm feeling or what I'm dealing with. This baby thing is really breaking my heart. I think that's why I had such a major meltdown and my health hit the skids with the breakup of my last relationship. I was 39 and found someone I thought I could deal with for the long haul. I thought I would finally "get what I want" - a family of my own. When the relationship ended, I really fell apart and didn't really know why. It's not like he was that awesome...LOL. Now, I know why. It seems impossible at 40, single and no TOM in months that I will get the family I have always wanted. In the past two years, all of my brothers have no gotten married and had children. My best friend, who is my age, is having her 5th child.

So, to the paradox. On the one hand, I'd say life has been really hard on me and it is very painful to live in a world that looks like other people get what they want (families) and I don't. On the other hand, I live in America. I live in a safe neighborhood, in a house I own, I drive a decent car, I have a job and people that care about me. What the heck do I have to complain about?

Dr K keeps talking about Dean Dwyer's book. I'd like to get it and read it but I haven't managed to read the last three books I bought.

I do feel more inner calm every day. I do feel a new attitude emerging. I read some of MamaGrok's blog over at MDA and the one thing I notice is how she wrote about binges, falling off the wagon, re-starting the Leptin Reset over and over and over again and yet there was no self-beratement or catastrophizing in them. Just very matter of fact, this is what I did and this is what I'll do tomorrow. I'm trying to adopt this attitude. I have been warring with myself and my body for so long, trying to force it to behave and be what I want. Just like life. This on going argument with God or life of whatever to "give me what I want." Really what I want is to be free of all these head games I play.

ANY WHOO

time to get out and enjoy the sunshine

### vkiernan — 2012-05-05T20:21:03+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-21646>

Wow, Jennifer - you need to be kind to yourself. You need to show that beautiful person that you are that you love her and not keep punishing her. Total self-destruction if you ask me. You are a beautiful person according to your pic and slim according to the weight you are posting. You also own your own home, you must have it together if you are able to do that. Why do you think you are fat? Has someone really messed you up verbally, mentally or otherwise? I am a lot like you and yes my ex verbally messed me up. You need to figure out your life before someone worthy will come into it and give you what you want. What is up with the hcg at your weight?

Sounds like you have some food issues that you need to deal with for starters. I, too find myself feeling sorry that I can't have this or that. Somehow, we need to change that thinking to be I want to eat this for my health. People are only satisfying what their tongues think they want and look what it is doing to them. I remind myself that it will sit on my tongue for only 1 minute so what is the point of eating it besides it will harm me in the long run. The other day my sister and I were talking and she said, Oh, I thought once you were better you coud eat this or that. I said no. I can't do that to myself as that is what got me to be in this place. She said no xxx, or xxx? I said no. Then she said I would rather die. I said you will! That is a really strong statement to make to your own sis but she clearly doesn't get it and I am tired of her ways.

Sorry if I am coming down on you too strong. Sounds like you really need some TLC. Maybe this is all hormone related. I have that problem big time and need to get it fixed. You said something about pushing away what you have worked so hard to get and I am doing that very thing with my DH. My fxxxing hormones mess with me big time and are now disrupting my marriage.

Ok, off my soap box. I sure hope you keep going. Have you been tested for Candida? If you have leaky gut you probably have candida. One begets the other. Dr. K told me optimal is nowhere in sight with candida. It will blow your reset no matter how many times you keep trying. It is the ultimate carb addiction maker.

Feel free to come over to my journal and give me some feedback too.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-05-05T22:32:27+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-21678>

Hi V~

Thanks for dropping in with words of wisdom.

I haven't weighed myself in forever. Quite a change from the strict hcg ways. I have a feeling that is part of the whole sabotage. I couldn't stand being under the strict "two pound" window any more. It was too stressful, especially for someone with already compromised adrenal glads. I did hcg last year after gaining weight. I lost with diet and exercise (but mostly just lost my boobs) and then after what I just call "that really bad time" I started gaining weight like crazy and no amount of exercise helped. Of course, what I didn't realize was that exercise was making it worse by taxing my adrenals even more. Since then I've been at war with the same 10 pounds. Constantly losing and gaining. I did a second round of hcg in January for two reasons. The stress of buying the house and the holidays had me eating like a crazed person and I gained about 8 pounds. Plus I wanted to lose 5. Also, I was praying that since hcg "took away" my period, it would magically reappear after a second round. No such luck.

I am guessing my weight is 142 right now, which makes me want to cry but not stop eating.

I know that I have some issues here with food. I know that I was fat in second grade. I know that I was really unhappy in second grade. I work with someone (therapy) and she does this process (N.E.T.) that looks at finding root causes and "when" patterns developed and it always comes up 2nd grade. I know I was very unhappy and lonely in 2nd grade. And of course, there is a whole host of men issues from my childhood (emotionally absent dad and overly-attentive sleazeball uncle).

I definitely have issues with secret eating which is why I am making myself write this journal and be honest. I feel like the bad student that Dr K will yell at any minute. Then again, maybe it's attention seeking behavior! LOL

I suspect that my eating gets worse when I feel left out and of course, gaining weight makes me less social and more left out. Of course, being on this diet is lonely. No alcohol, no coffee, no sugar - I take a lot of flak from friends and family. They all thought I was anorexic. Of course, now I've put 10 pounds back on so they should all shut it.

I also suspect I get mad at life and have no one to punish but myself, so I do. I don't really know. But I know that if I got busy enjoying life, I wouldn't have time to eat and drive myself nuts.

I DO KNOW that I can't war with myself any more over this. I suspect that I feel out of control in other areas of my life (love life) and so I am overly focused on weight - if I could just be thin my life would magically be better. It's all BS. And YES, I totally am mystified that I give food such power. I mean sometimes I'm eating so fast do I even taste it? It's ridiculous. It's JUST FOOD! Oh my head.

The candida thing is interesting. I kind of assume that I don't because I never get infections or anything. But, sometimes I feel drunk even though I have not had any alcohol - just real dizzy and bad coordination. My dad said that's yeast. I did take an antibioditic for months for my poor face (bad breakouts). Thank god they have resolved and I don't take it any more. I bought some molybddenum. That's supposed to be good for yeast but I haven't been faithful about taking it. I see the endocrinologist on Monday and have an appointment with functional med doctor in a week and a half. Of course, I kind of feel fantastic minus the pigging out part. So strange. Probably the estrogen finally kicked in. I had my repeat bloodwork but haven't heard a peep from the gyn.

Believe me, the wise person inside me gets tired of dealing with this wack-a-do that keeps sabotaging herself. I work in mental health for a living and I have got to be the worse patient I know! LOL (Not really)

As for you and your DH...I don't know how I would do if I did have a significant other. I know when my low blood sugar thing hits me, people just work my nerves so bad that it's almost psychically painful. It takes all of my control not to lash out. You gotta get your hormones right. Life is so much more fun shared. Don't mess that up. Maybe you can come up with a code system. You know, different colors for different moods. So he knows that you just don't feel well. Has he listened to any of the podcasts about adrenals, etc. Education always help.

God bless ya V!

### vkiernan — 2012-05-06T05:53:21+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-21732>

I have a lot of the same issues that you and am wondering just how much hormones are playing a rold in this. I certainly don't have very much self confidence. I, too, sabatoge my self. Never feeling pretty enough, thin enough etc. etc. I wolf my food too. In high school I use to eat so slow that my girlfriends would get mad, now I eat so fast I wonder who took my food away cuz I go looking for it and it is gone. I am working on that. I would tell you to keep eating until absolutely stuffed and start from there. Still no snacking and follow the leptin rx rules. But, do eat and nourish your body. I have to wonder if eating the HCG way messes you up cuz you eat so little and no fat. I know it works but at what cost to your health. You are NOT fat by any means. Matter-of-fact, you are probably a good weight for your height and do not need HCG.

Candida, as far as I know, doesn't have anything to do with infections. Or, at least I haven't experienced any. Iirc, candida causes leaky gut. As long as you are going to see a doc, try to get the tests done. It is just a blood test. They test for 3 things. One is present, past and something else. I think they are Iga, Igm and Igf???, hell if my memory ever worked; that's a hormone problem too. I do believe you have to be consistent and hard core when treating candida.

No the dh hasn't listened to anything except me. He is a small business owner and is stressed himself and very busy so really not much time.

I hear ya on the lonely part for this way of eating. Although, we have some friends who are now paleo too which helps but my dh isn't and that is tough cuz it all comes down to me and "you can't eat that" which really gets tiring after awhile. I can eat it, I just choose not to for good reasons.

I am going to look up N.E.T. I have never heard of that. I tried counseling but he didn't understand where I was coming from and kept telling me to be nicer. He obviously didn't get it. At that time I didn't know what was wrong with me though.

Anyway, enough rambling. I need to go to bed. I sure hope you find some success.

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-05-07T21:42:50+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-22002>

Monday May 7th

Finally gave in and got on the scale. I knew I'd get weighed at the doctor's today, so I figured it would be a lot lower naked at home than in the office. It was not pretty, as I feared I gained about 12 pounds since Easter. GHA

Leptin Reset Day 1 (again)

SW 127.5

**CW 142.5

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 9 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

The sabatoging has subsided and my cravings are less until I have a meal. Once I start to eat, it's hard to stop. Only eating three times a day kind of makes that harder in some ways (headwise). I've taken to making muffin cups in microwave - egg, flaxmeal, chocolate. I also made one with chocolate and ground up spinach. Not bad. Gonna have to cut this out though. BIG TIME. I know Dr K has said flaxmeal is worthless.

I went to see an endocrinologist today because of the whole no TOM 9 months thing and my crazy TSH. I also brought up my low blood sugar issues and his response was that while he sympathizes that it's unpleasant, it's not a disease. And I should just eat if I feel cranky. Great. Let me gain more weight. That will really solve things. He was very concerned about my normal FSH and otherwise bottomed out hormones. As per my gyn, I've been taking the estradiol. I started supplementing with progesterone cream too (on my own). I had repeat estrogen and the endo guy said that the first labs marked my estrogen level as "undetectable" and now they are just "low." Yeah me - LOL. So, he is questioning why my pituitary isn't responding to this situation correctly. He ordered a MRI and said after that we'd talk about my low blood sugar stuff.

He had a resident with him, so there was some conversation to the resident as "teachable moments" about me, in front of me, which is always fun. He basically told the resident that although I didn't have antibodies show up in my bloodwork, because of my thyroid ultrasound report, he diagnosed me with Hashimotos. SOOOO, now my brain is catching up and saying, wait a second, no antibodies? Maybe I'm not AI after all? Last fall my TSH suddently was way too low and I had to have my synthroid lowered significantly. I thought it was from stopping gluten. The endo says I probably had a virus. IDK I get the MRI on Monday and functional med doctor on Wed.

So, I am putting myself back on the ketodiet. We'll see how i feel. I noticed that the less I ate carbs, the more I got low blood sugar crashes. Why is that? Something seems wrong there. So, today I had steak, eggs, and bacon for breakfast along with tea and MCT oil and some CO with cinnamon. I felt very iritated after my doctor's appointment but, I don't know if that was from the doctor or me. I had a small piece of steak and salmon along with two more bacon for lunch and feel hungry/full - my head hurts and I feel hungry but my stomach physically feels full. Typical feelings I get when eating keto diet. I know Dr K says Keto is best BUT I FEEL LIKE CRAP when I eat this way! Someone please enlighten me. Because if I start feeling super irritated and low blood sugar again, I'm not gonna be able to eat keto. It's too miserable to feel this way!**

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-05-09T20:16:32+0300
**Source:** <https://forum.jackkruse.com/threads/jennifers-moving-from-leptin-reset-ct-adrenal-rx-leaky-gut-rx-ai-to-optimal.323/post-22623>

Leptin Reset Day 2 (starting over third time)

SW 127.5

CW 141.5

GW 125 (or flat stomach)

40 years old, 5’6 & 1/2;

Hashimoto’s, Raynaud’s, Adrenal Fatigue, No TOM in 8 months +, Leaky Gut (I am sure)

Still working the keto train. I have change my approach after some advice from the forum and I'm aggressively going at becoming a fat burner. I think whenever I do keto, my body tries to make sugar using the adrenal glands signaling the liver or something. In other words, the constant low blood sugar feeling despite eating a lot of protein. So, I'm doing the coconut milk shakes with major CO in the diet. The wise sage suggested 80% fat with half of that being CO. Right now my tummy feels grossly full and I am realizing that I am out of HCL and I need some bad. LOL Gotta get on that! So for breakfast I had ground turkey meat and bacon. I also bought the bulletproof coffee and even though coffee is a "no" for Adrenal RX, I have been drinking it. It has not given my a blood sugar crash, so I think I'm ok. Today I tried the primal coffee creamer - coconut milk, MCT oil, egg, vanilla. Pretty good. And I had the coconut milk shake (half a can at BAB and half for lunch). I'll admit I had a glass of wine last night because I was on a date. Believe me when I say, my hormones need me to go on dates. K?

I am sort of freaked about my endo ordering the Pituitary MRI. But I am more freaked by what the heck could be causing my hormones to tank so much. Could it be teh hcg? Did it break my HPA axis or something? Seriously, where are my hormones?!

### nosnhojjennifer@yahoo.com — 2012-05-13T15:26:08+0300

ACK...MORE WEIGHT GAIN....I could scream! My clothes are all so tight! I want to cry. WTF I am sick of gaining and gaining...I don't know what to do to reverse this. Well, I did not drink any beer, obviously for the gluten factor. In fact, the whole event was a major gluten-fest -- most of the food was pizza or some app on bread. I didn't have time to eat before I left, so I had a burger with bacon (no bun) from the food truck. It tasted spicy, so IDK...maybe there was something in the burger. I also tried samples of some olive oil and balsamic vinegar and cheese. Result, another gain and I feel like crap this morning like I am hung over. Please God let me see some real weight loss ASAP or I don't know what I'll do.
